framePrompts: portrait 9:16 cinematic scene of a quiet Indian neighborhood courtyard at early morning during Holi, soft golden sunlight filtering through trees, a group of joyful children standing with colorful gulal in their hands, one small child in the foreground looking curious and excited, vibrant powder colors floating lightly in the air, clay houses and rangoli in background, shallow depth of field, warm festive tones, ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, shot on 50mm lens, emotional and nostalgic atmosphere

portrait 9:16 cinematic Holi moment in the same courtyard, the children now laughing and throwing bright gulal into the air together, clouds of pink, yellow, and blue powder exploding mid-air, one child joyfully smearing color on another’s face, sunlight illuminating the particles like glowing dust, dynamic composition, mid-action freeze, colorful chaos but warm happiness, cinematic festival lighting, vibrant Indian Holi celebration energy

portrait 9:16 cinematic closing scene in the same courtyard after playing Holi, children sitting together on the ground covered in colors, smiling and catching their breath, faces painted with gulal, soft afternoon sunlight, colored powder settled on the ground around them, one child holding a small water pichkari while everyone laughs, peaceful joyful mood, warm nostalgic cinematic lighting, emotional ending frame
videoPrompts: camera slowly pushes forward as the children begin running toward each other, laughter starting, gulal rising from their hands and gradually bursting into the air as the first colors fly, sunlight glowing through the powder clouds creating a magical slow-motion Holi explosion

camera gently orbits around the children as the color storm settles, movement slowing, laughter fading into calm happiness, children gradually sit down together on the colorful ground while the powder drifts through the air and sunlight softens the scene
audioScript: जब बचपन रंगों से भर जाता है, तब होली सिर्फ त्योहार नहीं रहती… वो याद बन जाती है। इन छोटी हथेलियों से उड़ते रंग, दिलों में बस जाती हँसी, और हर चेहरे पर खिलती मासूम खुशी… यही तो असली होली है।
